queries.q: Write a PRD for the new self-serve onboarding flow
Engineering keeps asking what exactly we're building and why; I need one doc that settles scope, requirements, and success metrics before the sprint starts
We agreed on the problem and the approach for payment retries; now I need the full requirements doc for engineering handoff
Help me spec out the requirements for our Q3 epic so design, backend, and mobile are all working from the same source
Put together a product requirements document for migrating reporting to the new dashboard, including scope boundaries and success metrics
Stakeholders want to approve scope before we invest two quarters in this initiative; draft the spec doc they can sign off on
Draft a PRD for adding SSO support to the enterprise tier
I have a one-pager and leadership buy-in; turn this into a complete requirements document the team can build from
We're kicking off the offline mode initiative; create the spec that covers requirements, out-of-scope items, dependencies, and risks
Three teams are coordinating on the shared checkout rebuild; write the document that aligns everyone on what we're building, why, and how we'll measure success
Take this feature description and break it into user stories with acceptance criteria for next sprint's tickets
queries.notes: Ticket breakdown for a sprint belongs to the story skill, per the PRD's When NOT to Use

queries.q: Before we write any detailed spec, I need a one-page solution overview pitching the approach and trade-offs to stakeholders
queries.notes: One-page pitch for approach alignment comes before the PRD

queries.q: Document the architectural decision to move from REST to gRPC for our internal services
Write release notes announcing the new notifications feature to customers
Help me put together a pre-launch readiness checklist across marketing, support, and legal
Summarize what we learned from the 12 customer interviews last week
Write a SQL query that finds users who churned within 30 days of signup
My Next.js build is failing with a module resolution error; help me debug it
Book me a flight and hotel for the product offsite in Austin next month
Draft the OKRs for our platform team for next quarter
